title: Property Consultant - Jones Lang LaSalle - Multiple Openings

jsonLd.title: Property Consultant - Jones Lang LaSalle - Multiple Openings
jsonLd.description:
Jones Lang LaSalle, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Property Consultant for our Kanpur operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Jones Lang LaSalle:
Jones Lang LaSalle is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors
• Liaise with banks and NBFCs for home loan assistance to customers
• Conduct market research and provide competitive analysis
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Coordinate with architects, contractors, and project teams
• Prepare presentations and proposals for institutional clients

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Market Research
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Lease Administration
• Proficiency in GIS Tools
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in Property Management
• Proficiency in Property Valuation

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Life and accident insurance
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Kanpur, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Jones Lang LaSalle!
